text: The talk around openness & AI needs to distinguish between the vibrant and innovative open source movement that is advancing the state-of-the-art on harnesses & other key areas and open weights frontier models, which are entirely dependent on a the goodwill of a few Chinese firms

Lots of advances coming from the open source harness movement (including Moltbook, RAG approaches back in the day, etc.) but they depend on the intelligence of the models created by a small handful of companies & the more intelligent those models, the more others can do with them
And the idea that frontier open weights models will continue to be released was fragile even before the current de facto licensing regime. https://t.co/zbo1vUQczO

Working at Adobe office at Times Square and designing “Gallery of the Future” zine and curating the exhibition. 

Can’t believe this project took off and so many of you took part.  

Feeling connection with you all 

Hope you all have a good weekend https://t.co/OW4fpyZj5x
